docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF APR-20-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEOPLES GWEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPOULOS ATHENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEOPLES GWEN $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $808.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO PEOPLES GWEN RETURNED FOR BETTER ADDRESS.
